title: dysoxylum sericeum
intro: Dysoxylum sericeum, also known as the Velvet Dysoxylum or Velvet Mahogany, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Dysoxylum sericeum are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Ayurvedic formulations and remedies.
